productDisplayName: Colorbar Velvet Matte Thrilling Pink Lipstick 61P
description: Shade name:Thrilling Pink 61 PWhat is it:Get the velvety matte lips you always dreamt of with Colorbar’s Velvet Matte Lipstick.What it does:It keeps the lips moist but with a matte effect and stays on for long hours.The smooth and creamy colorbar matte lipstick is enriched with Vitamin E to protect and care for your lips.It stays for 8 hours without budging, feathering or bleeding. Benefits:Makes your lips look full and lush instantly.It is so intensely pigmented that one swipe is enough.It's got a smooth matte formula that sets within seconds of application.Available in varied vibrant and subtle shades.Nourished with Vitamin E, its unique 2-in-1 formulation gives the lips a creamy, yet matte finish
